nasb.text: I will deliver you and this city from the hand of the king of Assyria; and I will defend this city.” ’

esv.text: I will deliver you and this city out of the hand of the king of Assyria, and will defend this city.

cnv.text: 我必救你和這城脫離亞述王的手；我必保護這城。’

ccb.text: 我要从亚述王手中拯救你和这城，我要保护这城。’”

csbs.text: 我必解救你和这城脱离亚述王的手；我必保护这城。
